subcodes.first_line: We have revealed unto thee that for which thou wast created. Hold thou fast unto it and say: All praise be unto Thee, O Lord of the worlds. Verily, it is the knowledge of Thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اظهرنا لک ما خلقت له تمسک به و قل الحمد لک یا رب العالمین انه عرفان ربک و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @knowledge; recognition of God
